race.comment: BUGGSY (3) is a son of Harry Angel out of Miss Severina who debuts for the Price & Kent Jnr yard. He looks handy having won a recent trial and gets Craig Williams aboard from an ideal gate. Expected to go close first time out. BROOKELINDA (9) is a filly by Hellbent on debut for the Freedman yard who looked good winning a recent jumpout at Cranbourne. She's drawn a touch awkwardly but should be ready to go. DIRTY HARRY (4) was in the market on debut and ran a fair race behind the smart Simply Steffi. He'll be better for that and be running on strongly. ON A JOURNEY (13) is a filly by Royal Meeting on debut for the Dwyer yard who ran well in a recent trial and has claims while MISTIFYZOU (10) is a Zousain filly for the Hayes yard who must be respected.
